message:
chore(beads): close issues for batch ops tests, polynomial tests, misc ufunc tests, financial tests, and logaddexp NaN bug

Closed: franken_numpy-0p8n (linalg batch ops/random permuted tests), franken_numpy-37bj (financial function coverage), franken_numpy-6kal (Chebyshev/Hermite/Laguerre polynomial tests), franken_numpy-ij7w (busday/bitwise/gcd/divmod/histogram2d/convolve2d/block/vecdot/packbits tests), franken_numpy-hriq (logaddexp/logaddexp2 NaN propagation bug fix - new issue, immediately closed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
